title: Natural Structures
description: A mod focusing on making Natural themed stuff, such as Fallen tree groups, stone piles, Etc. Made with MCreator!
body:
# This mod has been Archived.

I may one day unarchive the project and remake most structures, and bring new ones aswell, but as of now it's archived, feel free to fork it.
# Welcome to Natural structures!, Made with MCreator!


## Whats the mod about?:

This mod is based off of Nature, the datapack includes ponds stone piles and More!
If you want to see what some of the small natural structures look like, then go into The gallery!


## Is this mod fully based off of nature?:

Yes, but no. The datapack also features The Excalibur, With Custom and Illegal enchantments on it. (the Excalibur doesn't have any too Overpowered Enchantments on.)


## Why can't i pull up the Excalibur?:

You can pull up the excalibur, you just have to right click a bit around the stone as there is a invinsible armor stand holding the sword, like try and right click it on all the sides of the stone.
